steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: Two linear equations have no solution when their graphs are parallel. Parallel lines have the same slope but different $y$-intercepts.

steps.title: Match the slopes
steps.content:
The first equation, $y=2x+1$, has slope $2$. The second equation, $y=ax-8$, has slope $a$. Set the slopes equal:
$$a=2$$
The answer is D.
